note: v1 sources have no URLs — only (title, author, tier, date). The v2 ingestion pipeline must resolve URLs before fetching. Resolution order: DOI (if any) via CrossRef / Semantic Scholar; publisher website search (e.g. ifs.org.uk/search) by title; gov.uk content API by title; fallback to Google Custom Search with publisher-domain filter. Entries that do not yield a URL go to the manual curator backlog.
